commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=52568e5bced804c5e8b9d757880944f9970b2f4d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `agents.defaults.compaction.thinkingLevel` config key, schema/help labels, embedded compaction fallback logic, AgentSession plumbing, and focused unit tests.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +133. Total +153 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: normal manual, gateway, preflight, and local session compaction pass active session thinking before the new config fallback can apply. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor follow-up are needed because this external PR has blocking correctness findings and missing real behavior proof that automation cannot supply.

target.title: feat(config): add compaction.thinkingLevel to override thinking during compaction
target.body:
## Summary

- **Problem**: Compaction always uses the session's current thinking level. There is no way to independently control thinking behavior during compaction summarization (e.g., disable thinking during compaction even when the session normally uses thinking).
- **Why it matters**: Users who want to save tokens/cost during compaction or avoid thinking artifacts in summaries had no option to disable thinking for compaction alone.
- **What changed**: Added `agents.defaults.compaction.thinkingLevel` config option. When set, compaction uses this thinking level instead of the session's current level. Precedence: explicit `params.thinkLevel` > `config.compaction.thinkingLevel` > `"off"` (default).
- **What did NOT change**: Existing behavior is fully preserved (unset config = session thinking level). The local session (agent-session.ts) plumbing accepts the option but callers are not yet updated to read from config.

## Change Type

- [x] New feature
- [x] Configuration change

**Scope**: Config, Compaction

## Security Impact

No security impact — thinking level override for compaction summarization only.

## Verification

- Unit tests pass (15 new tests across 3 test files)
- Config schema validates all 8 ThinkLevel values
- Embedded-agent-runner reads config as fallback
- Schema labels and help text updated

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible: unset config preserves existing behavior
- New optional field only, no migration needed
target.author: mpz4life
